features.name: system_sampled feeding multiple concurrent assertions
features.description: Code should include an sv.system.sampled operation whose result is used by multiple sv.assert.concurrent operations
features.snippet:
sv.system.sampled %concat : i37
sv.assert.concurrent posedge %clock, %reset label "a" message "foo"(%1) : i37
sv.assert.concurrent posedge %clock, %reset label "b" message "bar"(%1) : i37

features.name: concat result used by system_sampled
features.description: Code should include a comb.concat operation whose result is used as the operand to sv.system.sampled

features.name: wire spilling requirement for multi-use expression
features.description: Code should include an expression that after duplication becomes used by multiple operations, requiring wire spilling but not being spilled
features.snippet:
comb.concat %a, %b : i25, i12
sv.system.sampled %1 : i37
sv.assert.concurrent posedge %clock, %reset label "a" message "x"(%2) : i37
sv.assert.concurrent posedge %clock, %reset label "b" message "y"(%2) : i37
